# Avg execs per bucket (process exec anomaly)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Process-execution frequency / anomaly hunting — surface noisy or rare binaries per host. Avg execs per bucket.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS | bin _time span = 5m | comp count() as execs by agent_hostname, _time | comp avg(execs) as avg_execs_per_bucket, count() as bucket_count by agent_hostname | sort desc avg_execs_per_bucket | limit 30
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
